action_mappings.create_change_case: create change case for service case {}

action_mappings.release_routing_token: release routing token {} from service case {}
action_mappings.record_preapproval_for_tokened_route: record preapproval for service case {} using routing token {}
action_mappings.obtain_approver_preapproval: obtain preapproval for service case {} from approver {}
action_mappings.bind_network_control_and_mark_ready: bind network control {} with routing token {} and mark service case {} as ready
action_mappings.use_mitigation_action_to_mark_ready: use mitigation action {} to mark service case {} as ready
action_mappings.reserve_upstream_dependency: reserve upstream service {} for service case {}
action_mappings.release_upstream_dependency: release upstream service {} from service case {}
action_mappings.reserve_downstream_dependency: reserve downstream service {} for service case {}
action_mappings.release_downstream_dependency: release downstream service {} from service case {}
action_mappings.reserve_infrastructure_component: reserve infrastructure component {} for service case {}
action_mappings.release_infrastructure_component: release infrastructure component {} from service case {}
action_mappings.reserve_service_group: reserve service group {} for service case {}
action_mappings.release_service_group: release service group {} from service case {}
action_mappings.plan_mitigation_on_route: plan mitigation on route {} for service case {} involving upstream service {} and downstream service {}
action_mappings.plan_mitigation_with_infra_and_credentia: plan mitigation on route {} for service case {} using infrastructure component {} and credential {}
action_mappings.clear_external_review_and_release_flags: clear external review and release flags for service case {} involving upstream service {} and downstream service {}
action_mappings.collect_approvals_and_record: collect approvals and record for service case {} involving upstream service {}, downstream service {}, and stakeholder group {}
action_mappings.finalize_approvals_with_escalation: finalize approvals with escalation for service case {} involving infrastructure component {}, service group {}, and escalation group {}
action_mappings.commit_execution_and_clear_locks: commit execution and clear locks for service case {} involving upstream service {} and downstream service {}
action_mappings.reapply_network_control_to_resume: reapply network control {} to resume service case {} using routing token {}
action_mappings.claim_execution_token_for_route_segment: claim execution token for route segment of service case {} using routing token {}
action_mappings.claim_execution_token_with_approver: claim execution token for service case {} with approver {}
action_mappings.reserve_mitigation_action_for_case: reserve mitigation action {} for service case {}
action_mappings.bind_mitigation_to_instance: bind mitigation action {} to service instance type b {} for service instance type a {}
action_mappings.record_network_configuration_for_finaliz: record network configuration for finalization of service case {} using routing token {} and network control {}
action_mappings.close_case_standard_path: close case for service case {} using the standard path
action_mappings.close_case_with_mitigation_binding: close case for service case {} with mitigation action {} using mitigation binding
action_mappings.close_case_with_network_validation: close case for service case {} with network validation

action_mappings_indef.create_change_case: create change case for a service case {}
action_mappings_indef.assign_engineer_to_case: assign an engineer {} to a service case {}
action_mappings_indef.release_engineer_from_case: release an engineer {} from a service case {}
action_mappings_indef.reserve_routing_token: reserve a routing token {} for a service case {}
action_mappings_indef.release_routing_token: release a routing token {} from a service case {}
action_mappings_indef.record_preapproval_for_tokened_route: record preapproval for a service case {} using a routing token {}
action_mappings_indef.obtain_approver_preapproval: obtain preapproval for a service case {} from an approver {}
action_mappings_indef.bind_network_control_and_mark_ready: bind a network control {} with a routing token {} and mark a service case {} as ready
action_mappings_indef.use_mitigation_action_to_mark_ready: use a mitigation action {} to mark a service case {} as ready
action_mappings_indef.reserve_upstream_dependency: reserve an upstream service {} for a service case {}
action_mappings_indef.release_upstream_dependency: release an upstream service {} from a service case {}
action_mappings_indef.reserve_downstream_dependency: reserve a downstream service {} for a service case {}
action_mappings_indef.release_downstream_dependency: release a downstream service {} from a service case {}
action_mappings_indef.reserve_infrastructure_component: reserve an infrastructure component {} for a service case {}
action_mappings_indef.release_infrastructure_component: release an infrastructure component {} from a service case {}
action_mappings_indef.reserve_service_group: reserve a service group {} for a service case {}
action_mappings_indef.release_service_group: release a service group {} from a service case {}
action_mappings_indef.plan_mitigation_on_route: plan mitigation on a route {} for a service case {} involving an upstream service {} and a downstream service {}
action_mappings_indef.plan_mitigation_with_infra_and_credentia: plan mitigation on a route {} for a service case {} using an infrastructure component {} and a credential {}
action_mappings_indef.clear_external_review_and_release_flags: clear external review and release flags for a service case {} involving an upstream service {} and a downstream service {}
action_mappings_indef.collect_approvals_and_record: collect approvals and record for a service case {} involving an upstream service {}, a downstream service {}, and a stakeholder group {}
action_mappings_indef.finalize_approvals_with_escalation: finalize approvals with escalation for a service case {} involving an infrastructure component {}, a service group {}, and an escalation group {}
action_mappings_indef.commit_execution_and_clear_locks: commit execution and clear locks for a service case {} involving an upstream service {} and a downstream service {}
action_mappings_indef.reapply_network_control_to_resume: reapply a network control {} to resume a service case {} using a routing token {}
action_mappings_indef.claim_execution_token_for_route_segment: claim execution token for route segment of a service case {} using a routing token {}
action_mappings_indef.claim_execution_token_with_approver: claim execution token for a service case {} with an approver {}
action_mappings_indef.reserve_mitigation_action_for_case: reserve a mitigation action {} for a service case {}

action_mappings_indef.record_network_configuration_for_finaliz: record network configuration for finalization of a service case {} using a routing token {} and a network control {}
action_mappings_indef.close_case_standard_path: close case for a service case {} using the standard path
action_mappings_indef.close_case_with_mitigation_binding: close case for a service case {} with a mitigation action {} using mitigation binding
action_mappings_indef.close_case_with_network_validation: close case for a service case {} with network validation

predicate_mappings.infrastructure_reserved: {} is reserved by the infrastructure component {}
predicate_mappings.service_group_reserved: {} is reserved by the service group {}
predicate_mappings.mitigation_planned_on_route: a mitigation is planned on the route {} for {}
predicate_mappings.execution_token_claimed: the execution token has been claimed for {}
predicate_mappings.network_configuration_applied: the network configuration is applied to {}
predicate_mappings.case_route_candidate: {} is a candidate for the case {}
predicate_mappings.case_upstream_candidate: {} is a candidate for the case {}
predicate_mappings.case_downstream_candidate: {} is a candidate for the case {}
predicate_mappings.case_infrastructure_candidate: {} is a candidate for the case {}
predicate_mappings.case_service_group_candidate: {} is a candidate for the case {}
predicate_mappings.case_stakeholder_role: {} has a role in the case {}
predicate_mappings.mitigation_action_reserved: {} is reserved for the change case {}
predicate_mappings.case_closure_eligibility_flag: the case closure eligibility flag is set for {}

create_change_case.description: create change case for a service case A
preconditions: I can only create change case for a service case A if it is not the case that A is open and it is not the case that the case for A is closed
effects: Once I create change case for a service case A, it is the case that A is open

assign_engineer_to_case.description: assign an engineer B to a service case A
preconditions: I can only assign an engineer B to a service case A if it is the case that A is open and B is available and B is eligible for the case A
I can only assign an engineer B to a service case A if it is not the case that the assignee is reserved for A
effects: Once I assign an engineer B to a service case A, it is the case that A is assigned to B and the assignee is reserved for A
Once I assign an engineer B to a service case A, it is not the case anymore that B is available

release_engineer_from_case.description: release an engineer B from a service case A
preconditions: I can only release an engineer B from a service case A if it is the case that A is assigned to B
I can only release an engineer B from a service case A if it is not the case that a mitigation is authorized for A and it is not the case that approvals have been collected for A
effects: Once I release an engineer B from a service case A, it is the case that B is available

Once I release an engineer B from a service case A, it is not the case anymore that A is assigned to B and it is not the case anymore that the assignee is reserved for A and it is not the case anymore that preapproval is obtained for A and it is not the case anymore that route prechecks have passed for A and it is not the case anymore that stakeholder acknowledgment is required for A and it is not the case anymore that execution is committed for A and it is not the case anymore that external review is required for A

reserve_routing_token.description: reserve a routing token B for a service case A
preconditions: I can only reserve a routing token B for a service case A if it is the case that A is open and B is available for routing
effects: Once I reserve a routing token B for a service case A, it is the case that B is reserved for A
Once I reserve a routing token B for a service case A, it is not the case anymore that B is available for routing

release_routing_token.description: release a routing token B from a service case A
preconditions: I can only release a routing token B from a service case A if it is the case that B is reserved for A
effects: Once I release a routing token B from a service case A, it is the case that B is available for routing
Once I release a routing token B from a service case A, it is not the case anymore that B is reserved for A

record_preapproval_for_tokened_route.description: record preapproval for a service case A using a routing token B
preconditions: I can only record preapproval for a service case A using a routing token B if it is the case that A is open and the assignee is reserved for A and B is reserved for A
I can only record preapproval for a service case A using a routing token B if it is not the case that preapproval is obtained for A
effects: Once I record preapproval for a service case A using a routing token B, it is the case that preapproval is obtained for A

obtain_approver_preapproval.description: obtain preapproval for a service case A from an approver B
preconditions: I can only obtain preapproval for a service case A from an approver B if it is the case that A is open and the assignee is reserved for A and B is available
I can only obtain preapproval for a service case A from an approver B if it is not the case that preapproval is obtained for A
effects: Once I obtain preapproval for a service case A from an approver B, it is the case that preapproval is obtained for A and stakeholder acknowledgment is required for A
Once I obtain preapproval for a service case A from an approver B, it is not the case anymore that B is available

bind_network_control_and_mark_ready.description: bind a network control C with a routing token B and mark a service case A as ready
preconditions: I can only bind a network control C with a routing token B and mark a service case A as ready if it is the case that preapproval is obtained for A and the assignee is reserved for A and B is reserved for A and C is available
I can only bind a network control C with a routing token B and mark a service case A as ready if it is not the case that route prechecks have passed for A
effects: Once I bind a network control C with a routing token B and mark a service case A as ready, it is the case that route prechecks have passed for A
Once I bind a network control C with a routing token B and mark a service case A as ready, it is not the case anymore that stakeholder acknowledgment is required for A

use_mitigation_action_to_mark_ready.description: use a mitigation action B to mark a service case A as ready
preconditions: I can only use a mitigation action B to mark a service case A as ready if it is the case that the assignee is reserved for A and B is bound to the A instance
I can only use a mitigation action B to mark a service case A as ready if it is not the case that route prechecks have passed for A
effects: Once I use a mitigation action B to mark a service case A as ready, it is the case that route prechecks have passed for A
Once I use a mitigation action B to mark a service case A as ready, it is not the case anymore that stakeholder acknowledgment is required for A

reserve_upstream_dependency.description: reserve an upstream service B for a service case A
preconditions: I can only reserve an upstream service B for a service case A if it is the case that A is open and B is available upstream and B is a candidate for the case A
effects: Once I reserve an upstream service B for a service case A, it is the case that A is reserved upstream by B
Once I reserve an upstream service B for a service case A, it is not the case anymore that B is available upstream

release_upstream_dependency.description: release an upstream service B from a service case A
preconditions: I can only release an upstream service B from a service case A if it is the case that A is reserved upstream by B
effects: Once I release an upstream service B from a service case A, it is the case that B is available upstream
Once I release an upstream service B from a service case A, it is not the case anymore that A is reserved upstream by B

reserve_downstream_dependency.description: reserve a downstream service B for a service case A
preconditions: I can only reserve a downstream service B for a service case A if it is the case that A is open and B is available downstream and B is a candidate for the case A
effects: Once I reserve a downstream service B for a service case A, it is the case that A is reserved downstream by B
Once I reserve a downstream service B for a service case A, it is not the case anymore that B is available downstream

release_downstream_dependency.description: release a downstream service B from a service case A
preconditions: I can only release a downstream service B from a service case A if it is the case that A is reserved downstream by B
effects: Once I release a downstream service B from a service case A, it is the case that B is available downstream
Once I release a downstream service B from a service case A, it is not the case anymore that A is reserved downstream by B

reserve_infrastructure_component.description: reserve an infrastructure component B for a service case A
preconditions: I can only reserve an infrastructure component B for a service case A if it is the case that A is open and B is available in the infrastructure and B is a candidate for the case A
effects: Once I reserve an infrastructure component B for a service case A, it is the case that A is reserved by the infrastructure component B
Once I reserve an infrastructure component B for a service case A, it is not the case anymore that B is available in the infrastructure

release_infrastructure_component.description: release an infrastructure component B from a service case A
preconditions: I can only release an infrastructure component B from a service case A if it is the case that A is reserved by the infrastructure component B
effects: Once I release an infrastructure component B from a service case A, it is the case that B is available in the infrastructure
Once I release an infrastructure component B from a service case A, it is not the case anymore that A is reserved by the infrastructure component B

reserve_service_group.description: reserve a service group B for a service case A
preconditions: I can only reserve a service group B for a service case A if it is the case that A is open and B is available and B is a candidate for the case A
effects: Once I reserve a service group B for a service case A, it is the case that A is reserved by the service group B
Once I reserve a service group B for a service case A, it is not the case anymore that B is available

release_service_group.description: release a service group B from a service case A
preconditions: I can only release a service group B from a service case A if it is the case that A is reserved by the service group B
effects: Once I release a service group B from a service case A, it is the case that B is available
Once I release a service group B from a service case A, it is not the case anymore that A is reserved by the service group B

plan_mitigation_on_route.description: plan mitigation on a route B for a service case A involving an upstream service C and a downstream service D
preconditions: I can only plan mitigation on a route B for a service case A involving an upstream service C and a downstream service D if it is the case that the assignee is reserved for A and A is reserved upstream by C and A is reserved downstream by D and B is available and B is a candidate for the case A
I can only plan mitigation on a route B for a service case A involving an upstream service C and a downstream service D if it is not the case that a mitigation is authorized for A
effects: Once I plan mitigation on a route B for a service case A involving an upstream service C and a downstream service D, it is the case that a mitigation is planned on the route B for A and a mitigation is authorized for A
Once I plan mitigation on a route B for a service case A involving an upstream service C and a downstream service D, it is not the case anymore that B is available

plan_mitigation_with_infra_and_credentia.description: plan mitigation on a route B for a service case A using an infrastructure component C and a credential D
preconditions: I can only plan mitigation on a route B for a service case A using an infrastructure component C and a credential D if it is the case that the assignee is reserved for A and A is reserved by the infrastructure component C and D is available and B is available and B is a candidate for the case A and D is required for the case A
I can only plan mitigation on a route B for a service case A using an infrastructure component C and a credential D if it is not the case that a mitigation is authorized for A
effects: Once I plan mitigation on a route B for a service case A using an infrastructure component C and a credential D, it is the case that a mitigation is planned on the route B for A and a mitigation is authorized for A and external review is required for A and stakeholder acknowledgment is required for A

Once I plan mitigation on a route B for a service case A using an infrastructure component C and a credential D, it is not the case anymore that B is available and it is not the case anymore that D is available

clear_external_review_and_release_flags.description: clear external review and release flags for a service case A involving an upstream service B and a downstream service C
preconditions: I can only clear external review and release flags for a service case A involving an upstream service B and a downstream service C if it is the case that a mitigation is authorized for A and external review is required for A and A is reserved upstream by B and A is reserved downstream by C
effects: Once I clear external review and release flags for a service case A involving an upstream service B and a downstream service C, it is not the case anymore that external review is required for A and it is not the case anymore that stakeholder acknowledgment is required for A

collect_approvals_and_record.description: collect approvals and record for a service case A involving an upstream service B, a downstream service C, and a stakeholder group D
preconditions: I can only collect approvals and record for a service case A involving an upstream service B, a downstream service C, and a stakeholder group D if it is the case that route prechecks have passed for A and a mitigation is authorized for A and A is reserved upstream by B and A is reserved downstream by C and D has a role in the case A

I can only collect approvals and record for a service case A involving an upstream service B, a downstream service C, and a stakeholder group D if it is not the case that stakeholder acknowledgment is required for A and it is not the case that approvals have been collected for A
effects: Once I collect approvals and record for a service case A involving an upstream service B, a downstream service C, and a stakeholder group D, it is the case that approvals have been collected for A

finalize_approvals_with_escalation.description: finalize approvals with escalation for a service case A involving an infrastructure component B, a service group C, and an escalation group D
preconditions: I can only finalize approvals with escalation for a service case A involving an infrastructure component B, a service group C, and an escalation group D if it is the case that route prechecks have passed for A and a mitigation is authorized for A and A is reserved by the infrastructure component B and A is reserved by the service group C and D has a role in the case A

I can only finalize approvals with escalation for a service case A involving an infrastructure component B, a service group C, and an escalation group D if it is not the case that approvals have been collected for A
effects: Once I finalize approvals with escalation for a service case A involving an infrastructure component B, a service group C, and an escalation group D, it is the case that approvals have been collected for A and stakeholder acknowledgment is required for A

commit_execution_and_clear_locks.description: commit execution and clear locks for a service case A involving an upstream service B and a downstream service C
preconditions: I can only commit execution and clear locks for a service case A involving an upstream service B and a downstream service C if it is the case that approvals have been collected for A and stakeholder acknowledgment is required for A and A is reserved upstream by B and A is reserved downstream by C
effects: Once I commit execution and clear locks for a service case A involving an upstream service B and a downstream service C, it is the case that execution is committed for A

Once I commit execution and clear locks for a service case A involving an upstream service B and a downstream service C, it is not the case anymore that stakeholder acknowledgment is required for A and it is not the case anymore that route prechecks have passed for A and it is not the case anymore that external review is required for A

reapply_network_control_to_resume.description: reapply a network control C to resume a service case A using a routing token B
preconditions: I can only reapply a network control C to resume a service case A using a routing token B if it is the case that execution is committed for A and approvals have been collected for A and the assignee is reserved for A and B is reserved for A and C is available
I can only reapply a network control C to resume a service case A using a routing token B if it is not the case that route prechecks have passed for A
effects: Once I reapply a network control C to resume a service case A using a routing token B, it is the case that route prechecks have passed for A

claim_execution_token_for_route_segment.description: claim execution token for route segment of a service case A using a routing token B
preconditions: I can only claim execution token for route segment of a service case A using a routing token B if it is the case that approvals have been collected for A and route prechecks have passed for A and B is reserved for A

I can only claim execution token for route segment of a service case A using a routing token B if it is not the case that stakeholder acknowledgment is required for A and it is not the case that the execution token has been claimed for A
effects: Once I claim execution token for route segment of a service case A using a routing token B, it is the case that the execution token has been claimed for A

claim_execution_token_with_approver.description: claim execution token for a service case A with an approver B
preconditions: I can only claim execution token for a service case A with an approver B if it is the case that approvals have been collected for A and route prechecks have passed for A and B is available

I can only claim execution token for a service case A with an approver B if it is not the case that stakeholder acknowledgment is required for A and it is not the case that the execution token has been claimed for A
effects: Once I claim execution token for a service case A with an approver B, it is the case that the execution token has been claimed for A
Once I claim execution token for a service case A with an approver B, it is not the case anymore that B is available

reserve_mitigation_action_for_case.description: reserve a mitigation action B for a service case A
preconditions: I can only reserve a mitigation action B for a service case A if it is the case that the execution token has been claimed for A and B is available and B is applicable for A
effects: Once I reserve a mitigation action B for a service case A, it is the case that B is reserved for the change case A
Once I reserve a mitigation action B for a service case A, it is not the case anymore that B is available

bind_mitigation_to_instance.description: bind a mitigation action C to a service instance type b A for a service instance type a service instance type a B
preconditions: I can only bind a mitigation action C to a service instance type b A for a service instance type a service instance type a B if it is the case that A is open and A requires a finalization check and A instance supports C mitigation action and C is reserved for the change case B
I can only bind a mitigation action C to a service instance type b A for a service instance type a service instance type a B if it is not the case that C is bound to the A instance
effects: Once I bind a mitigation action C to a service instance type b A for a service instance type a service instance type a B, it is the case that C is bound to the A instance

record_network_configuration_for_finaliz.description: record network configuration for finalization of a service case A using a routing token B and a network control C
preconditions: I can only record network configuration for finalization of a service case A using a routing token B and a network control C if it is the case that A is open and A requires a finalization check and route prechecks have passed for A and the execution token has been claimed for A and B is reserved for A and C is available
I can only record network configuration for finalization of a service case A using a routing token B and a network control C if it is not the case that the network configuration is applied to A
effects: Once I record network configuration for finalization of a service case A using a routing token B and a network control C, it is the case that the network configuration is applied to A

close_case_standard_path.description: close case for a service case A using the standard path
preconditions: I can only close case for a service case A using the standard path if it is the case that the case closure eligibility flag is set for A and A is open and the assignee is reserved for A and a mitigation is authorized for A and approvals have been collected for A and the execution token has been claimed for A and route prechecks have passed for A
I can only close case for a service case A using the standard path if it is not the case that the case for A is closed
effects: Once I close case for a service case A using the standard path, it is the case that the case for A is closed

close_case_with_mitigation_binding.description: close case for a service case A with a mitigation action B using mitigation binding
preconditions: I can only close case for a service case A with a mitigation action B using mitigation binding if it is the case that A requires a finalization check and A is open and the assignee is reserved for A and a mitigation is authorized for A and approvals have been collected for A and the execution token has been claimed for A and route prechecks have passed for A and B is bound to the A instance
I can only close case for a service case A with a mitigation action B using mitigation binding if it is not the case that the case for A is closed
effects: Once I close case for a service case A with a mitigation action B using mitigation binding, it is the case that the case for A is closed

close_case_with_network_validation.description: close case for a service case A with network validation
preconditions: I can only close case for a service case A with network validation if it is the case that A requires a finalization check and A is open and the assignee is reserved for A and a mitigation is authorized for A and approvals have been collected for A and the execution token has been claimed for A and route prechecks have passed for A and the network configuration is applied to A
I can only close case for a service case A with network validation if it is not the case that the case for A is closed
effects: Once I close case for a service case A with network validation, it is the case that the case for A is closed

action_nl_templates.create_change_case: create change case for service case {?change_case}
action_nl_templates.reserve_routing_token: reserve routing token {?routing_token} for service case {?change_case}
action_nl_templates.release_routing_token: release routing token {?routing_token} from service case {?change_case}
action_nl_templates.record_preapproval_for_tokened_route: record preapproval for service case {?change_case} using routing token {?routing_token}
action_nl_templates.obtain_approver_preapproval: obtain preapproval for service case {?change_case} from approver {?approver}
action_nl_templates.bind_network_control_and_mark_ready: bind network control {?network_control} with routing token {?routing_token} and mark service case {?change_case} as ready
action_nl_templates.use_mitigation_action_to_mark_ready: use mitigation action {?mitigation_action} to mark service case {?change_case} as ready
action_nl_templates.reserve_upstream_dependency: reserve upstream service {?upstream_service} for service case {?change_case}
action_nl_templates.release_upstream_dependency: release upstream service {?upstream_service} from service case {?change_case}
action_nl_templates.reserve_downstream_dependency: reserve downstream service {?downstream_service} for service case {?change_case}
action_nl_templates.release_downstream_dependency: release downstream service {?downstream_service} from service case {?change_case}
action_nl_templates.reserve_infrastructure_component: reserve infrastructure component {?infrastructure_component} for service case {?change_case}
action_nl_templates.release_infrastructure_component: release infrastructure component {?infrastructure_component} from service case {?change_case}
action_nl_templates.reserve_service_group: reserve service group {?service_group} for service case {?change_case}
action_nl_templates.release_service_group: release service group {?service_group} from service case {?change_case}
action_nl_templates.plan_mitigation_on_route: plan mitigation on route {?route} for service case {?change_case} involving upstream service {?upstream_service} and downstream service {?downstream_service}
action_nl_templates.plan_mitigation_with_infra_and_credentia: plan mitigation on route {?route} for service case {?change_case} using infrastructure component {?infrastructure_component} and credential {?credential}
action_nl_templates.clear_external_review_and_release_flags: clear external review and release flags for service case {?change_case} involving upstream service {?upstream_service} and downstream service {?downstream_service}
action_nl_templates.collect_approvals_and_record: collect approvals and record for service case {?change_case} involving upstream service {?upstream_service}, downstream service {?downstream_service}, and stakeholder group {?stakeholder_group}
action_nl_templates.finalize_approvals_with_escalation: finalize approvals with escalation for service case {?change_case} involving infrastructure component {?infrastructure_component}, service group {?service_group}, and escalation group {?escalation_group}
action_nl_templates.commit_execution_and_clear_locks: commit execution and clear locks for service case {?change_case} involving upstream service {?upstream_service} and downstream service {?downstream_service}
action_nl_templates.reapply_network_control_to_resume: reapply network control {?network_control} to resume service case {?change_case} using routing token {?routing_token}
action_nl_templates.claim_execution_token_for_route_segment: claim execution token for route segment of service case {?change_case} using routing token {?routing_token}
action_nl_templates.claim_execution_token_with_approver: claim execution token for service case {?change_case} with approver {?approver}
action_nl_templates.reserve_mitigation_action_for_case: reserve mitigation action {?mitigation_action} for service case {?change_case}
action_nl_templates.bind_mitigation_to_instance: bind mitigation action {?mitigation_action} to service instance type b {?service_instance_type_b} for service instance type a {?service_instance_type_a}
action_nl_templates.record_network_configuration_for_finaliz: record network configuration for finalization of service case {?change_case} using routing token {?routing_token} and network control {?network_control}
action_nl_templates.close_case_standard_path: close case for service case {?change_case} using the standard path
action_nl_templates.close_case_with_mitigation_binding: close case for service case {?change_case} with mitigation action {?mitigation_action} using mitigation binding
action_nl_templates.close_case_with_network_validation: close case for service case {?change_case} with network validation

predicate_nl_templates.infrastructure_reserved: {?change_case} is reserved by the infrastructure component {?infrastructure_component}
predicate_nl_templates.service_group_reserved: {?change_case} is reserved by the service group {?service_group}
predicate_nl_templates.mitigation_planned_on_route: a mitigation is planned on the route {?route} for {?change_case}
predicate_nl_templates.execution_token_claimed: the execution token has been claimed for {?change_case}
predicate_nl_templates.network_configuration_applied: the network configuration is applied to {?change_case}
predicate_nl_templates.case_route_candidate: {?route} is a candidate for the case {?change_case}
predicate_nl_templates.case_upstream_candidate: {?upstream_service} is a candidate for the case {?change_case}
predicate_nl_templates.case_downstream_candidate: {?downstream_service} is a candidate for the case {?change_case}
predicate_nl_templates.case_infrastructure_candidate: {?infrastructure_component} is a candidate for the case {?change_case}
predicate_nl_templates.case_service_group_candidate: {?service_group} is a candidate for the case {?change_case}
predicate_nl_templates.case_stakeholder_role: {?stakeholder_group} has a role in the case {?change_case}
predicate_nl_templates.mitigation_action_reserved: {?mitigation_action} is reserved for the change case {?change_case}
predicate_nl_templates.case_closure_eligibility_flag: the case closure eligibility flag is set for {?change_case}

action_nl_templates_indef.create_change_case: create change case for a service case {?change_case}
action_nl_templates_indef.assign_engineer_to_case: assign an engineer {?engineer} to a service case {?change_case}
action_nl_templates_indef.release_engineer_from_case: release an engineer {?engineer} from a service case {?change_case}
action_nl_templates_indef.reserve_routing_token: reserve a routing token {?routing_token} for a service case {?change_case}
action_nl_templates_indef.release_routing_token: release a routing token {?routing_token} from a service case {?change_case}
action_nl_templates_indef.record_preapproval_for_tokened_route: record preapproval for a service case {?change_case} using a routing token {?routing_token}
action_nl_templates_indef.obtain_approver_preapproval: obtain preapproval for a service case {?change_case} from an approver {?approver}
action_nl_templates_indef.bind_network_control_and_mark_ready: bind a network control {?network_control} with a routing token {?routing_token} and mark a service case {?change_case} as ready
action_nl_templates_indef.use_mitigation_action_to_mark_ready: use a mitigation action {?mitigation_action} to mark a service case {?change_case} as ready
action_nl_templates_indef.reserve_upstream_dependency: reserve an upstream service {?upstream_service} for a service case {?change_case}
action_nl_templates_indef.release_upstream_dependency: release an upstream service {?upstream_service} from a service case {?change_case}
action_nl_templates_indef.reserve_downstream_dependency: reserve a downstream service {?downstream_service} for a service case {?change_case}
action_nl_templates_indef.release_downstream_dependency: release a downstream service {?downstream_service} from a service case {?change_case}
action_nl_templates_indef.reserve_infrastructure_component: reserve an infrastructure component {?infrastructure_component} for a service case {?change_case}
action_nl_templates_indef.release_infrastructure_component: release an infrastructure component {?infrastructure_component} from a service case {?change_case}
action_nl_templates_indef.reserve_service_group: reserve a service group {?service_group} for a service case {?change_case}
action_nl_templates_indef.release_service_group: release a service group {?service_group} from a service case {?change_case}
action_nl_templates_indef.plan_mitigation_on_route: plan mitigation on a route {?route} for a service case {?change_case} involving an upstream service {?upstream_service} and a downstream service {?downstream_service}
action_nl_templates_indef.plan_mitigation_with_infra_and_credentia: plan mitigation on a route {?route} for a service case {?change_case} using an infrastructure component {?infrastructure_component} and a credential {?credential}
action_nl_templates_indef.clear_external_review_and_release_flags: clear external review and release flags for a service case {?change_case} involving an upstream service {?upstream_service} and a downstream service {?downstream_service}
action_nl_templates_indef.collect_approvals_and_record: collect approvals and record for a service case {?change_case} involving an upstream service {?upstream_service}, a downstream service {?downstream_service}, and a stakeholder group {?stakeholder_group}
action_nl_templates_indef.finalize_approvals_with_escalation: finalize approvals with escalation for a service case {?change_case} involving an infrastructure component {?infrastructure_component}, a service group {?service_group}, and an escalation group {?escalation_group}
action_nl_templates_indef.commit_execution_and_clear_locks: commit execution and clear locks for a service case {?change_case} involving an upstream service {?upstream_service} and a downstream service {?downstream_service}
action_nl_templates_indef.reapply_network_control_to_resume: reapply a network control {?network_control} to resume a service case {?change_case} using a routing token {?routing_token}
action_nl_templates_indef.claim_execution_token_for_route_segment: claim execution token for route segment of a service case {?change_case} using a routing token {?routing_token}
action_nl_templates_indef.claim_execution_token_with_approver: claim execution token for a service case {?change_case} with an approver {?approver}
action_nl_templates_indef.reserve_mitigation_action_for_case: reserve a mitigation action {?mitigation_action} for a service case {?change_case}
action_nl_templates_indef.bind_mitigation_to_instance: bind a mitigation action {?mitigation_action} to a service instance type b {?service_instance_type_b} for a service instance type a service instance type a {?service_instance_type_a}
action_nl_templates_indef.record_network_configuration_for_finaliz: record network configuration for finalization of a service case {?change_case} using a routing token {?routing_token} and a network control {?network_control}
action_nl_templates_indef.close_case_standard_path: close case for a service case {?change_case} using the standard path
action_nl_templates_indef.close_case_with_mitigation_binding: close case for a service case {?change_case} with a mitigation action {?mitigation_action} using mitigation binding
action_nl_templates_indef.close_case_with_network_validation: close case for a service case {?change_case} with network validation

type_hierarchy: Everything that is a service case or a engineer or a route or a downstream service or a upstream service or a infrastructure component or a routing token or a approver or a mitigation action or a network control or a credential or a service group or a stakeholder role is also a object
Everything that is a stakeholder group or a escalation group is also a stakeholder role
Everything that is a service instance type a or a service instance type b is also a service case
